title: The Missing Trophy
brief: The community trophy vanished from the locked hall overnight. Three people held keys.

suspects.name: Caretaker
suspects.profile: Holds the master key; claims he was home all night.

suspects.name: Captain
suspects.profile: Wanted the trophy relocated; alibi is a phone call.

suspects.name: Treasurer
suspects.profile: Last to leave; signed out at 9pm.

evidence.label: Door log
evidence.detail: Keycard entry at 11:42pm under the caretaker’s card.

evidence.label: Phone records
evidence.detail: The captain’s call ended at 10:30pm, not midnight.

title: The Spoiled Soup
brief: The wedding soup was ruined with too much salt minutes before serving.

suspects.name: Head Cook
suspects.profile: Tasted it last and approved it.

suspects.name: Rival Caterer
suspects.profile: Lost the contract to the couple.

suspects.name: New Helper
suspects.profile: Was alone with the pot during the toast.

evidence.label: Salt sack
evidence.detail: A half-empty sack found behind the rival caterer’s van.

evidence.label: CCTV
evidence.detail: Shows the rival entering the kitchen at 2pm.

title: The Vanished Painting
brief: A valuable painting disappeared from the gallery during a power cut.

suspects.name: Night Guard
suspects.profile: Reported the outage; was on duty alone.

suspects.name: Curator
suspects.profile: Had insured the painting heavily last week.

suspects.name: Electrician
suspects.profile: Serviced the fuse box that morning.

evidence.label: Insurance form
evidence.detail: Curator doubled the coverage six days prior.

evidence.label: Fuse box
evidence.detail: Tampered manually, not a fault, per the inspector.

title: The Broken Window
brief: A shop window was smashed and the till emptied after closing.

suspects.name: Ex-Employee
suspects.profile: Fired last month; still had a uniform.

suspects.name: Delivery Driver
suspects.profile: Made a late drop-off that evening.

evidence.label: Footprints
evidence.detail: Match work boots issued to staff.

evidence.label: Receipt
evidence.detail: Driver’s drop logged at 6pm, store shut at 7pm.

title: The Tampered Scoreboard
brief: The quiz final scoreboard was altered to crown the wrong winner.

suspects.name: Scorekeeper
suspects.profile: Had sole access to the laptop.

suspects.name: Sponsor
suspects.profile: Wanted a local team to win.

evidence.label: Login log
evidence.detail: One login at 9:50pm — the scorekeeper’s.

evidence.label: Edit history
evidence.detail: A score changed at 9:52pm.

title: The Empty Fuel Tank
brief: The generator ran dry overnight though it was filled at dusk.

suspects.name: Watchman
suspects.profile: Filled it and kept the key.

evidence.label: Siphon hose
evidence.detail: Found hidden near the tenant’s unit.

evidence.label: Fuel log
evidence.detail: Tank was full at 7pm per the watchman.

title: The Switched Cake
brief: The birthday cake was swapped for a cheaper one before the cut.

evidence.label: Delivery note
evidence.detail: Only one premium cake was paid for.

evidence.label: Table photo
evidence.detail: Planner rearranged the table at 4pm.

title: The Leaked Question
brief: An exam question leaked to one class the night before.

suspects.name: Teacher
suspects.profile: Has a relative in the class.

evidence.label: Phone forward
evidence.detail: A photo sent from the teacher’s number at 9pm.

evidence.label: Print log
evidence.detail: Printing finished at 6pm, before the leak.

title: The Missing Donations
brief: Cash donations from the fundraiser came up short by half.

suspects.name: Volunteer
suspects.profile: Held the box during the event.

evidence.label: Count sheet
evidence.detail: Treasurer’s figure differs from the ticket count.

evidence.label: Box seal
evidence.detail: Reopened and resealed, per the auditor.

title: The Sabotaged Drone
brief: A racing drone crashed mid-final after a tampered battery.

suspects.name: Pilot
suspects.profile: Owns the drone and the spare battery.

suspects.name: Rival Pilot
suspects.profile: Was seen near the pit before the race.

evidence.label: Battery cap
evidence.detail: Loosened by hand, not flight damage.

evidence.label: Pit camera
evidence.detail: Rival lingered at the bench at 3pm.

title: The Phantom Order
brief: A huge fake catering order nearly bankrupted a small kitchen.

suspects.name: Supplier
suspects.profile: Was paid up front for ingredients.

evidence.label: Caller ID
evidence.detail: Traced to a burner near the competitor’s shop.

evidence.label: Deposit
evidence.detail: Supplier received and kept the deposit.

title: The Altered Will
brief: A family will was changed days before it was read.

evidence.label: Ink test
evidence.detail: A clause added in newer ink.

evidence.label: Visitor log
evidence.detail: Heir signed in the day before the change.

title: The Cut Power Line
brief: A street lost power right as the night market opened.

suspects.name: Linesman
suspects.profile: Was working the pole that afternoon.

evidence.label: Cut marks
evidence.detail: Clean cut from a tool, not weather.

evidence.label: Toolbox
evidence.detail: A bolt cutter found in the shopowner’s store.

title: The Stolen Recipe
brief: A secret stew recipe appeared on a rival’s menu overnight.

evidence.label: Note photo
evidence.detail: A snap of the recipe card on the waiter’s phone.

evidence.label: Shift log
evidence.detail: Waiter worked the rival’s kitchen that night.

title: The False Alarm
brief: A fire alarm emptied the office right before a big presentation.

evidence.label: Panel print
evidence.detail: Manual pull at booth three.

evidence.label: Seat map
evidence.detail: Rival sat beside booth three.

title: The Swapped Keys
brief: A car went missing after keys were swapped at a valet stand.

evidence.label: Ticket stub
evidence.detail: Owner’s stub matched a different car.

evidence.label: Claim form
evidence.detail: Owner filed a claim within the hour.

title: The Muddy Footprint
brief: A garden shed was raided and the prize seeds taken.

suspects.name: Neighbour
suspects.profile: Competes in the same flower show.

evidence.label: Footprint
evidence.detail: Adult size, treaded boot near the show.

evidence.label: Glove
evidence.detail: A gardening glove dropped by the fence.

title: The Deleted Files
brief: Project files were wiped the night before a deadline.

suspects.name: Manager
suspects.profile: Was over budget on the project.

evidence.label: Access log
evidence.detail: A delete command at 11pm from an office IP.

evidence.label: Badge swipe
evidence.detail: Manager swiped in at 10:50pm.

title: The Counterfeit Ticket
brief: Two guests arrived with the same VIP ticket number.

evidence.label: Serial scan
evidence.detail: The duplicate was a photocopy, scanned second.

evidence.label: Listing
evidence.detail: Reseller posted the number for sale.

title: The Overflowing Tap
brief: An office flooded overnight from a tap left running.

suspects.name: Cleaner
suspects.profile: Was last to leave the kitchen.

evidence.label: Work order
evidence.detail: Plumber left the washer loose, per the report.

evidence.label: Sign-out
evidence.detail: Cleaner signed out before the worker.
